name: PrivateClaw
description: Ephemeral end-to-end encrypted private session plugin for OpenClaw.

relayBaseUrl.description: Relay base URL used to derive /ws/provider and /ws/app endpoints. Defaults to https://relay.privateclaw.us.

sessionTtlMs.description: Lifetime of a one-time PrivateClaw session in milliseconds.

welcomeMessage.description: Encrypted welcome message sent to the client after handshake.

botMode.description: Enable proactive bot-mode group replies: greet silent joiners after 10 minutes and re-engage quiet groups after 20 minutes.

botModeSilentJoinDelayMs.description: Optional override for the silent-join proactive greeting delay in milliseconds.

botModeIdleDelayMs.description: Optional override for the quiet-group proactive re-engagement delay in milliseconds.

providerLabel.description: Label rendered into the invite payload and QR metadata.

webhookUrl.description: Optional upstream bridge endpoint that converts user messages into OpenClaw replies.

webhookToken.description: Optional bearer token sent with the webhook bridge.

bridgeMode.description: Which upstream bridge the plugin should use for PrivateClaw sessions.

echoPrefix.description: Prefix used when bridgeMode is set to echo.

openclawAgentExecutable.description: Optional executable path used for the OpenClaw agent bridge.

openclawAgentId.description: Optional OpenClaw agent id forwarded to `openclaw agent`.

openclawAgentChannel.description: Optional OpenClaw channel id forwarded to `openclaw agent`.

openclawAgentLocal.description: Whether the OpenClaw agent bridge should pass --local.

openclawAgentTimeoutSeconds.description: Optional timeout in seconds for `openclaw agent` invocations.
